pub struct Endpoint<'r, const ROLE: u8, K, Mint = crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfig> where K: carrier::SessionKitFamily + 'r, Mint: crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfigMarker, {
pub struct RouteBranch<'e, 'r, const ROLE: u8, K, Mint = crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfig> where K: carrier::SessionKitFamily + 'r, Mint: crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfigMarker, {
pub fn flow<'e, M>( &'e mut self, ) -> SendResult< flow::Flow<'e, 'r, ROLE, M, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint>, > where M: crate::global::MessageSpec + crate::global::SendableLabel, 'cfg: 'r, {
pub async fn recv<M>(&mut self) -> RecvResult<M::Payload> where M: crate::global::MessageSpec, M::Payload: crate::transport::wire::WireDecodeOwned, {
pub async fn offer<'e>( &'e mut self, ) -> RecvResult< RouteBranch<'e, 'r, ROLE, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint>, > {
pub fn label(&self) -> u8 {
pub async fn decode<M>(self) -> RecvResult<M::Payload> where M: crate::global::MessageSpec, M::Payload: crate::transport::wire::WireDecodeOwned, {
pub enum SendError {
pub enum RecvError {
pub type SendResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, SendError>;
pub type RecvResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, RecvError>;
